name: game-asset-tools
description: PixelLab MCP access for pixel-art game asset generation.

interface.shortDescription: PixelLab MCP for pixel-art game assets.
interface.longDescription: Game Asset Tools packages PixelLab MCP for generating pixel-art characters, animations, tilesets, isometric tiles, and map objects. PixelLab credentials load from the local Codex secrets directory, and creation/destructive tools prompt by default to avoid accidental credit spend.
defaultPrompt: Create pixel-art game assets with PixelLab.
